rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §33.0834 governs interscholastic athletic competition by biological sex. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 33.0834. INTERSCHOLASTIC ATHLETIC COMPETITION BASED ON BIOLOGICAL SEX.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no overlap in subject matter.
